api_key_2.description: SolarWinds Service Desk API key, sent as a Bearer token. Takes priority over api_key when both are configured (matching legacy's firstSecret("api_key_2", "api_key") precedence). Never logged.

api_key.description: SolarWinds Service Desk API key (fallback name), sent as a Bearer token when api_key_2 is not configured. Never logged.

base_url.description: SolarWinds Service Desk (Samanage) API base URL override for tests or proxies.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound forwarded verbatim as the updated_after query param; only sent when set (matches legacy's pass-through, no local validation).

page.description: Page number forwarded verbatim as the page query param; only sent when set (legacy is single-request/non-paginating and merely passes this through, no local validation).

per_page.description: Page size forwarded verbatim as the per_page query param; only sent when set (legacy is single-request/non-paginating and merely passes this through, no local validation).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
